'''Yanth''' was a member of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species, and was a [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. He owned the [[Tusken Oasis]] nightclub. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was interested in buying a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] from [[Lorn Pavan]], containing information about the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] for half a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] along with 2 other [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] bodyguards at the Tusken Oasis nightclub. When [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] investigated his death on the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council's]] orders, he thought Yanth was shot by a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]].
